General.Name: China Silver Group Ltd
General.Description: China Silver Group Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures, trades in, and sells silver ingots, palladium, and other non-ferrous metals in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Manufacturing and New Jewellery Retail segments. The company designs and sells gold, silver, colored gemstones, gem-set, and other jewellery products. It also engages in the manufacture of batteries; and consulting activities. China Silver Group Limited was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, the People's Republic of China.
General.Address: Shuibei Jewelry Headquarters Building, Shenzhen, China
